name: Gold King Bullion
description_short: Arizona-based precious metals buyer and seller with 10 Valley locations offering competitive gold, silver, platinum, and coin pricing with on-site electronic testing.
description_long:
Gold King Bullion operates as a local precious metals dealer across the Phoenix metropolitan area, with 10 physical locations spanning cities including Phoenix, Mesa, Tempe, Scottsdale, and Chandler. The company functions primarily as a buyer and seller of bullion and rare coins, positioning itself as an alternative to national online retailers while maintaining local accessibility.

The company offers a full range of precious metals services including buying and selling gold coins (American Eagle, Maple Leaf, Krugerrand, Panda, Philharmonic, Kangaroo, Britannia), fractional gold coins, silver bullion, platinum, palladium, and specialty items. They provide live spot pricing for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium updated regularly throughout trading hours. Customers can either purchase bullion online or visit physical locations for in-person transactions. The company also accepts trade-ins and offers a gold value calculator tool for price estimation.

Gold King Bullion differentiates itself through convenient local accessibility with 10 Arizona locations, same-day cash payments for sales (eliminating shipping hassles), and advanced on-site testing equipment including the Thermo Fisher XRF Spectrometer for verifying precious metal content and purity. They explicitly market competitive pricing against national competitors like JM Bullion and APMEX, claiming to match or beat their buy prices and undersell their sell prices when inventory is available locally. Extended hours (open 7 days weekly) and specialized staff expertise add to their positioning.

The company maintains transparent pricing limitations, acknowledging on their website that prices move constantly and their current website cannot perfectly reflect real-time spreads. They candidly note a website redesign was expected by March 28, 2026 to address pricing accuracy issues. Some pricing data on their site appears inconsistent (e.g., quarter ounce fractional coins showing conflicting buy/sell prices), suggesting the acknowledged system limitations. For consumers seeking local, immediate precious metals transactions with same-day payment, Gold King Bullion provides genuine value; however, online shoppers should verify current pricing directly against national competitors.
address: 2803 W Van Buren St, Phoenix, AZ 85009

company_info.headquarters: 2803 W Van Buren St, Phoenix, AZ 85009

pros: 10 convenient physical locations across Phoenix valley eliminates shipping requirements
Same-day cash or check payment when selling precious metals in-person
Advanced on-site electronic testing (Thermo Fisher XRF Spectrometer) for transparent purity verification
Live spot pricing for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium updated throughout trading day
Explicit price-matching claim against major national retailers (JM Bullion, APMEX)
Open 7 days per week at all locations for customer convenience
Fractional coin availability (tenths, quarters, halves) for lower-entry-point investing
No shipping costs or delays for local transactions
cons: Website acknowledgment that current pricing system cannot accurately reflect real-time market spreads
Pricing data on site shows inconsistencies and errors (some fractional coins with mismatched buy/sell figures)
Limited to Arizona geography despite online shop option; no national shipping advantage over established bullion retailers
Geographically limited customer base restricts liquidity compared to national platforms with millions of users
Website redesign was promised by March 28, 2026 but accuracy of current prices remains questionable pending update
best_for: Arizona residents seeking to sell bullion/gold jewelry locally without shipping costs or delays
Precious metals investors preferring immediate cash settlement over mailed payment
Consumers wanting on-site electronic verification of metal purity before transaction completion
Gold/silver buyers wanting to compare local availability and pricing against national options before purchase
diagnosis: Gold King Bullion is best for Arizona residents who want to liquidate precious metals or coins quickly for cash without shipping hassles, or who prefer local price verification before purchase. The main caveat is that online national competitors may offer equivalent or better pricing for purchases, and the company's acknowledged website technical limitations create pricing uncertainty—always verify current rates directly before committing to a transaction.
services: Buy gold coins (American Eagle, Maple Leaf, Krugerrand, Panda, Philharmonic, Kangaroo, Britannia)
Sell gold coins and fractional gold coins to customers
On-site precious metal purity testing with electronic XRF Spectrometer
Live spot price tracking for gold, silver, platinum, palladium
Gold value calculator tool for customer estimates
Cash or check payment for bullion sales
Purchase inquiries for custom orders or specific coins
